<!--
  شكراً لمساهمتك في Ibn Al-Azhar Docs!
  Thank you for contributing! Before opening a PR, make sure:
  - [ ] You have read CONTRIBUTING.md
  - [ ] `pnpm check` passes (lint + typecheck + format)
  - [ ] You added/updated tests for the change
  - [ ] Documentation is updated where relevant
  - [ ] The PR is focused on a single, cohesive change
-->

## 📋 Summary / الوصف

<!-- What changed and why? / ماذا تغيّر ولماذا؟ -->

## 🏷️ Type / النوع

- [ ] `feat:`     New feature
- [ ] `fix:`      Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor:` Code refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs:`     Documentation only
- [ ] `test:`     Tests only
- [ ] `chore:`    Tooling / build / misc

## 🔗 Related issue / Issue مرتبط

Closes #

## 🧪 How was it tested? / كيف تم الاختبار؟

- [ ] Unit tests (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Integration tests (`pnpm test:integration`)
- [ ] API tests (`pnpm test:api`)
- [ ] Security tests (`pnpm test:security`)
- [ ] E2E tests (`pnpm test:e2e`)
- [ ] Manual test (describe affected pages/routes)

## 📸 Screenshots (if UI changed) / لقطات شاشة

| Before | After |
| ------ | ----- |
|        |       |

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally (lint + typecheck + format)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] RTL/LTR and i18n considered
- [ ] Dark/light mode verified (if UI)
- [ ] No new `console.error` / `console.warn`
- [ ] Soft-delete (`deletedAt`) respected in DB queries
- [ ] **No secrets/keys committed** (runs `pnpm secrets:scan`)
- [ ] **`QUEUE_DRIVER` prod config unchanged** (no edits to runtime config, Dockerfile, or supervisord.conf)

## 📝 Notes for reviewers / ملاحظات للمراجع

<!-- Focus on: security, performance, RTL, accessibility, and not breaking API/DB contracts. -->
